keySettingsDescription: Create a new signing key or import an existing unencrypted PEM private key.
privateKeyDescription: Supports unencrypted PKCS#8, RSA PRIVATE KEY, and EC PRIVATE KEY PEM blocks.
privateKeyFileHint: Private keys are read locally and are not stored in browser preferences.
privacyNoteDescription: CSR creation and key generation run in this browser. Keep downloaded private keys secure and never share them with a certificate authority.
subjectDescription: Fill the distinguished name fields that identify the certificate request.
subjectHint: At least one Subject field or SAN entry is required. Most public TLS certificates rely on SAN for hostnames.
sanDescription: Add DNS names, IP addresses, email addresses, or URIs that should appear in the CSR extension.
sanHint: Use one value per line or separate values with commas. SAN is recommended for modern TLS certificates.
resultDescription: Review, copy, or download the generated certificate request and private key.
emptyDescription: Enter a Subject or SAN, choose key settings, and generate a CSR.
csrDescription: Send this PEM CSR to your certificate authority.
privateKeyOutputDescription: Save this PEM private key securely. It is required to install or renew the issued certificate.
importedKeyNote: An imported private key is never re-exported; only the CSR is generated.
readFileError: Could not read the selected private key file.
errorMissingSubjectOrSan: Provide at least one Subject field or SAN entry.
errorUnsupportedPem: Unsupported PEM block. Provide an unencrypted private key.
errorEncryptedKey: Encrypted private keys are not supported.
errorUnsupportedKeyType: Unsupported key type for CSR signing.
errorWebCryptoUnavailable: Web Crypto is not available in this browser.
